display_text: Cost: 0: Vambrace. This attribute-focused item provides +10 to your hero's primary attribute (Strength, Agility, or Intelligence) and +4 to all others. Its unique effect scales with your main attribute, offering additional defensive or offensive power: Strength grants +10% Magic Resistance, Agility grants +15 Attack Speed, and Intelligence grants +8% Spell Amplification. Stats: Primary Stat: +10, All Stats: +4, CD: N/A.

display_text: Cost: 0: Vambrace enhances a hero's core identity in team fights. Its conditional bonuses are triggered by your primary attribute: Strength heroes gain enhanced magic durability, Agility heroes attack faster, and Intelligence heroes deal more spell damage. This allows heroes to lean harder into their natural strengths, scaling their main contribution in fights.

display_text: Cost: 0: Vambrace offers situational defense based on your primary attribute. Strength Vambrace (+10% Magic Resistance) provides defense against magic-heavy lineups. Intelligence Vambrace (+8% Spell Amp) enhances magical nuking power, ideal against low magic resistance targets. Agility Vambrace (+15 Attack Speed) boosts physical damage output, effective against low-armor heroes.

display_text: Cost: 0: Vambrace synergizes with heroes who benefit most from their primary stat. Strength initiators and tanks value the magic resistance. Agility carries scale well with the attack speed for faster farming and DPS. Intelligence casters appreciate the spell amp for higher burst damage. It's a flexible item that tailors its bonus to the buyer.
